scenario: batch backfill / 38 包 + 34 residue 迁移清理

criteriaResults.summary: 真实 vault 最新 evidence 将 72 个目录分为 38 个 already_migrated 和 34 个 residue_quarantined，residue 的 mayGenerateBookManifest=false，未被提升为 authoritative package。

source-of-truth gate 绑定 distribution manifest sidecars、canonical input、source closure、qmd build manifest、GraphRAG output manifest、producer lineage 和 artifact checksums；缺 source closure 测试 fail closed 且不生成 BOOK_MANIFEST。
实现将 legacy source/input/qmd/output/runs/state 转为 package-relative source、input、qmd、graphrag/output、graphrag/runs、state，并以 mount.packageRoot='.' 与 files closure 记录目标布局。
BOOK_MANIFEST、manifest checksum、content checksum、runtime compatibility、artifact metadata 与 publish marker checksum 均由包内当前内容重新生成；backfill 对新包发布保持 marker-last。
34 个 residue 保留 quarantine_without_delete、mountAllowed=false、exportAllowed=false、deletePerformed=false；真实包 forbidden residue scan 为 0。

--force 对已验证包走 verified_existing 且不重写 manifest/publish marker/runtime compatibility；真实 vault 38 个包可验证且 skipped 38。但 partial_migration staged resume、failed_interrupted 显式恢复、用户 metadata 冲突防覆盖仍未闭环，--only-missing 跳过路径主要依赖 marker 存在性。

sameSourceHashDifferentBookId、sameBookIdDifferentSourceHash、source-hash prefix conflict、partial/target/live-root conflict 均有稳定诊断记录；backfill 将 duplicate 和 hard identity conflict fail closed，focused tests 覆盖 duplicate sourceHash 与 same bookId different sourceHash。

evidence 包含 plan、classification、copy-map、manifest-diff、checkpoint、validation、commit-record、residue-report、book-conflicts，且记录 skipped、failed、packageResults；但最终 backfill 仍直接写 live root，缺 build staging root、fsync、atomic rename、rollback restore 的实现证明。

books/sources/document-identity-map/graph-capabilities 可从 BOOK_MANIFEST 和 publish marker 重建；真实 catalog 为 38/38/38/30 且 stale 引用为 0。global qmd projection / qmd-book-projections cleanup 仍未实现或产生 evidence。

本轮 backfill 3 tests、catalog 8 tests、runtime gate 2 tests 通过，覆盖 duplicate conflict、same bookId conflict、verify-only、residue/source-closure/catalog/runtime gate。仍缺 38/34 批量 fixture、partial resume、failed interrupted、用户 metadata conflict、staging mismatch/lock takeover 和完整 manual decision workflow 自动化。

findings.summary: partial_migration 与 failed_interrupted 已能分类并写入冲突/evidence，但尚无从 copy-map checkpoint staged resume 或显式 resume/restart decision 的执行路径。

--only-missing skip branch checks BOOK_MANIFEST/PUBLISH_READY sidecar existence rather than validateExistingHotplugPackage(); the current real vault validates 38/38, but a corrupt existing package with all marker files present could be skipped without quality-gate validation.

candidate validation uses a temporary staging root, but live migration writes manifest and marker directly under the live book root; no implementation evidence for staging-first build root, fsync, atomic rename, or restore of previous live root.
catalog 38/38/30 已满足且 stale 引用为 0，但 final contracts 要求的 qmd-projection.yaml / qmd-book-projections 派生状态与 cleanup 未见实现或真实 vault evidence。

sameBookIdDifferentSourceHash 当前由 backfill hard conflict 阻断，但 classification 在追加 migration_book_id_source_hash_conflict 之前计算 criticalDiagnostics，导致该分类对象本身仍可能显示 mayGenerateBookManifest=true；执行层已补救，分类语义仍不够收敛。
focused tests 已通过，但固定基准要求的 38/34 批量 fixture、中断恢复、用户 metadata 冲突、staging mismatch、锁接管和 durable manual-decision matrix 尚未自动化。

commandsRun: read-only Node check for latest real vault migration evidence
read-only Node check for catalog counts and stale projection references
read-only Node check for manifest/publish marker sidecar completeness
read-only Node validateBookHotplugPackage scan over 38 real packages
read-only Node scan for forbidden package residues
